summary: Iteration 7: Verified refactored backend (modular routes) and restructured UI. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Login, Dashboard with stats, Clients page, Configuration page now shows ONLY 3 tabs (API Keys, Knowledge Base, Tono & Stile), Generator page has 2 modes (Articolo Singolo / SEO Programmatica) with integrated tabs (Keywords, Strategia, Analisi SERP, Prompt Avanzato, Genera). SERP scraping with DuckDuckGo returns real results. Activity Log page shows generation history.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login with admin@seoengine.it returns token and role=admin
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Invalid credentials return 401
Backend: GET /api/clients - Returns list of clients with totale_articoli
Backend: GET /api/clients/{id} - Returns specific client details
Backend: GET /api/clients/nonexistent - Returns 404
Backend: GET /api/users - Returns list of users (admin only)
Backend: GET /api/stats/overview - Returns admin stats (total_clients, total_articles, etc)
Backend: GET /api/activity-logs - Returns all activity logs (admin)
Backend: GET /api/activity-logs/{client_id} - Returns client-specific logs
Backend: POST /api/serp/search - Returns SERP results using DuckDuckGo
Backend: POST /api/serp/search - Empty keyword returns 400
Backend: GET /api/articles - Returns articles list
Backend: GET /api/clients/{id}/combinations - Returns keyword combinations
Frontend: Login page has email, password inputs and submit button
Frontend: Admin login redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats (1 client, 4 articles, 4 published)
Frontend: Clients page shows client table with Noleggio Auto Salerno
Frontend: Configuration page (/clients/{id}/config) has ONLY 3 tabs: API Keys, Knowledge Base, Tono & Stile
Frontend: Configuration page does NOT have Keywords, Strategia, SERP, Prompt tabs (moved to Generator)
Frontend: Generator page (/clients/{id}) has mode toggle: Articolo Singolo / SEO Programmatica
Frontend: Generator SEO Programmatica mode has 5 integrated tabs: Keywords, Strategia, Analisi SERP, Prompt Avanzato, Genera
Frontend: SERP analysis in Generator returns real results from DuckDuckGo (Hertz, Skyscanner, KAYAK)
Frontend: Activity Log page shows 22 total operations with success/error counts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has been refactored from monolithic server.py to modular routes (routes/auth_users.py, routes/clients.py, routes/articles.py, routes/gsc.py). server.py is now a thin entry point (~48 lines). UI restructured: Configuration page simplified to 3 tabs (API Keys, Knowledge Base, Tono & Stile), Generator page now has 2 modes with integrated tabs (Keywords, Strategia, SERP, Prompt, Genera). SERP scraping changed from googlesearch-python to DuckDuckGo lite endpoint and works correctly. Activity Log is in dedicated page only.

serp_analysis.returns: Real results with title, URL, description, headings
